$comment: The Squishy corpus CONSTITUTION — the shape of the score, separate from the bytes (build/meta/edition.json). With a flat geomean (one vote per file), the roster IS the formula, so the roster gets its own small formula here. This file changes RARELY (≈once per decade, reviewed hard); an edition only refills these cells with bytes. Every scored vote is a `cell`; anything distributed but NOT a cell (throughput ladder, incompressible length rungs, bounds fixtures) is a `diagnostic` and is structurally incapable of entering the score. Enforced by tests/test_roster_consistency.py and tests/test_edition_manifest.py.
$edition_note: The constitution is edition-AGNOSTIC: it carries no edition string on purpose. One schema_version can outlive several dated editions (Squishy-2026, Squishy-2030, …); each edition records which schema_version it conformed to (see build/meta/edition.json). The edition identity's single source of truth is scripts/squishy.py:EDITION.

roles.kind: The backbone: one human-scale exemplar per (category, kind). Kind cells MUST be mutually lineage-unique (no two share a source/lineage) — this is the anti-gaming independence rule.
roles.length: A deliberate re-sample of a kind at a much larger size, to probe long-range matching / large windows / parallel decode. Binds to its kind via `scales`; EXEMPT from lineage-uniqueness (it is supposed to share its kind's data shape). Must share the `kind` it scales; same lineage is preferred, a same-kind different-source rung is permitted (e.g. markup-L=enwik9). At most one length cell per kind.
roles.incompressible: A near-incompressible real exemplar (ratio ≈ 1.0). Capped and mechanism-diverse — it lowers every codec's headline by the same factor and so never changes the ranking; extra near-1.0 votes only compress the score's dynamic range, so the budget is small.

budgets.$comment: These are the declared, tested invariants. A change here is a constitutional change, reviewed as such.

category_votes.$comment: Declared per-category vote count for this edition. The guard test fails if the live roster drifts from these. KNOWN TENSION (flagged for next-edition review): Binary & Media sits at the high end (8) after the 2026 executable-format expansion while Prose sits at the floor (2, no large rung yet). Accepted for Squishy-2026; revisit by either trimming the native-machine-code sub-cluster (exe/winexe/armexe are three ISA/format samples of one regime) or adding a large PD-prose rung.

cells.note: permitted same-kind different-source length rung (no 1 GB Shakespeare exists; real-data rule forbids minting one)

distinct kind: a release-mirror artifact (cross-version near-duplicates hundreds of MB apart) — the long-range-dedup corner. Shares the LLVM umbrella with monorepo but is different content (four release trees concatenated vs one dev tree); accepted as independent.
NOAA GHCN-Daily 2021-2023 — DISJOINT years from the kind cell, so zero shared bytes (the 1.33 GB 2024-full file, a strict prefix of the slice, was dropped to a diagnostic).

diagnostics.reason: 1.33 GB NOAA GHCN 2024-full — the small csv kind cell is a strict prefix of it (same bytes twice). Superseded as the length rung by the disjoint-years csv-L; kept distributed as an unscored extra.
Incompressible length rung adds no ratio signal (ratio ≈ 1.0 like the kind cell); kept as a throughput/large-decode fixture, not a vote.
Model-weight throughput/RAM ladder — unmeasured speed fixture, never a ratio vote.
Model-weight throughput/RAM ladder — unmeasured speed fixture, never a ratio vote.
